acceptanceSignals: Employees can view per-order deductions, refunds, and dispute statuses.
Ledger entries are append-only with source event references.
Dispute workflow has owner, timestamps, and resolution trace.

attempts.latestEventSummary: feature completed: Payroll Ledger and Dispute Tracking in 0 attempts

lastCommit.message: feat: implement Payroll Ledger and Dispute Tracking (attempt 4)

reinforcementResults.name: HTTP Contract Sync Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: The active policy is satisfied for this feature: the new payroll/dispute external HTTP operations are synchronized with OpenAPI (`contract/openapi/openapi.yaml` and `openapi.json`), generated TypeScript client artifacts were updated in the same change set (`contract/generated/ts-client/**`), and contract tests include route-to-spec parity plus payroll endpoint error-response/schema validation.

reinforcementResults.name: High-Risk Write Audit Discipline
reinforcementResults.summary: The current Payroll Ledger and Dispute Tracking implementation satisfies the active audit policy: high-risk payroll/dispute writes append immutable audit evidence with attributable identity (`actorId`, `role`), `entityId`, `reason`, `timestamp`, and `correlationId`; audit storage uses append-only evidence sequencing with investigation-by-correlation support; and the feature ships with SFTP-first exchange, optional HR API adjunct sync, append-only ledger adjustment lineage, and retention purge controls.

reinforcementResults.name: No Legacy Path Rule
reinforcementResults.summary: Static review indicates this feature satisfies the active policy in scope: per-order employee payroll view includes deductions/refunds/disputes, ledger/dispute records are append-only with source-event traceability, SFTP batch is the core exchange path with HR API as adjunct, and payroll/dispute retention purge controls are implemented. No legacy/fallback payroll handler/DTO/route was found as an active official path for this feature. Test execution was not possible in this read-only sandbox.

reinforcementResults.name: Financial Close Integrity Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Workspace implementation satisfies the active payroll policy: employee per-order ledger/dispute visibility, append-only ledger with source event references, dispute owner/timestamp/resolution trace, SFTP-core exchange with optional HR API adjunct sync, cycle-key + snapshot checksum with same-cycle idempotent replay, exception coverage for refunded/deduction-failed/terminated employees, and payroll/dispute retention purge controls.

excludedApproaches: Using manual CSV upload as official payroll interface path.
Overwriting financial records in place without adjustment lineage.
Keeping payroll/PII indefinitely without policy controls.
executionConstraints: Use SFTP batch as core payroll exchange path; support HR API sync as optional adjunct.
Implement immutable per-order payroll ledger with traceable adjustments.
Apply defined retention/deletion policy to payroll and dispute data.
name: Payroll Ledger and Dispute Tracking
rationale: Employee trust and finance control require transparent and traceable deductions.
summary: Deliver transparent payroll accounting and dispute lifecycle visibility.
